description: FoundrySkills agent profile category taxonomy. Agents are organized by professional domain. Each agent defines WHO the AI becomes -- persona, voice, tools, success metrics.

engineering.label: Engineering Agents
engineering.description: Agents for software engineering tasks including code review, architecture, DevOps, security, QA, and performance

business.label: Business Agents
business.description: Agents for business operations including product management, marketing, finance, legal compliance, and executive communication

operations.label: Operations Agents
operations.description: Agents for operational roles including data analysis, customer support, HR, and operations management

creative.label: Creative Agents
creative.description: Agents for creative roles including UX research, content strategy, and visual design

orchestration.label: Orchestration Agents
orchestration.description: Agents that coordinate other agents and manage multi-agent workflows, sprints, incidents, and research
